story.title: Trump warns Taiwan against declaring independence, hours after summit with China's Xi
story.summary: The US president says he wants Beijing and Taipei to "cool down" tensions over the self-governing island.
story.selection_reason: The story about Trump warning Taiwan against declaring independence has significant implications for global geopolitics and international relations between the US, China, and Taiwan.
